deploy.startCommand: python manage.py collectstatic --no-input && python manage.py shell -c "from django.db import connection; c=connection.cursor(); c.execute(\"DELETE FROM django_migrations WHERE app='tickets'\"); print(f'Cleared {c.rowcount} migration records')" && python manage.py migrate --fake tickets 0001_initial && python manage.py migrate --no-input && python manage.py createsuperadmin && python manage.py seed_master && gunicorn agentdesk.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT
